Description

Port-to-port distance, fuel consumption, travel time and cost — calculated to the nearest mile, minute and dollar. Professional-grade voyage planning tools powered by AI, built for captains and fleet managers.

Features include unlimited route calculations, AI sea route generation, global fuel price tracking, vessel fuel curve analysis, trip history & analytics, and cloud sync across devices. $9.99/month or $99/year — everything included.

About this app

Port-to-port distance, fuel consumption, travel time and cost — calculated to the nearest mile, minute and dollar. Professional-grade voyage planning powered by AI.

Unlimited route calculations, AI sea route generation, global fuel price tracking, vessel fuel curve analysis, trip history & analytics, and cloud sync across devices. $9.99/month or $99/year — everything included.
